steps.title: Refer to both cities
steps.content: The previous sentence names two cities, Quito and Kisumu. The blank modifies the plural noun cities, so it must use a plural demonstrative that refers to both places.

steps.title: Choose the plural modifier
steps.content: The matching choice is the plural demonstrative that agrees with cities. Choice B is singular, Choice C is singular, and Choice D is singular, so none of them can correctly modify the plural noun. The answer is A.
